Container.Name: mem0-aio
Container.Overview:
Mem0 (OpenMemory) gives LLM apps a persistent memory layer with a UI, API, and vector store. [center][b][color=#ff8c00]JSONbored Verified AIO Template[/color][/b][/center]
This AIO template bundles the OpenMemory UI, API, and Qdrant into one container with persistent storage and same-origin browser routing by default. It is designed to be easy for first-time Unraid users while still exposing advanced overrides for direct API access, alternate providers, and external backends.
[b]Beginner Defaults:[/b] 1. Install and start the container. 2. If you want OpenAI immediately, set `OPENAI_API_KEY` below. 3. If you prefer local inference, you can leave the key blank, let the stack boot, and then configure Ollama or another provider from the UI. 4. Your data persists in the mapped `/mem0/storage` path.

Config.Name: API / MCP Port
Config.Description: Direct API and MCP port. The UI does not require this port, but external MCP clients may.

Config.Name: AppData - OpenMemory Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and embedded Qdrant data.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional on first boot. Required if you want OpenAI as the default provider. If left blank, the container still boots so you can configure Ollama or another provider from the UI.

Config.Name: Default User ID
Config.Description: Default memory namespace used by the UI and API.

Config.Name: [UI] Browser API URL
Config.Description: Default same-origin proxy path for the Web UI. Leave this alone unless you intentionally want the UI to call a different API URL directly.

Config.Name: [UI] Public User ID
Config.Description: Default user ID shown in the browser client.

Config.Name: [LLM] Provider
Config.Description: Optional first-run override. Examples: openai, ollama, anthropic, groq, together, deepseek.

Config.Name: [LLM] API Key
Config.Description: Optional provider-specific API key if you are not using OPENAI_API_KEY.

Config.Name: [LLM] Base URL
Config.Description: Optional custom API base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

Config.Name: [Embedder] Base URL
Config.Description: Optional custom embedder API base URL.

Config.Name: [Storage Override] DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Advanced override for the API database connection. Leave default for normal AIO usage.

Config.Name: [Storage Override] Qdrant Host
Config.Description: Advanced override for the vector database host. Leave default for the embedded Qdrant service.

Config.Name: [Storage Override] Qdrant Port
Config.Description: Advanced override for the vector database port. Leave default for the embedded Qdrant service.
